behavior_summary: U8P_FROCK::release is a small utility process that checks the item's surface weight and, if that weight is zero, awards 0x0F (15) dexterity via AccumulateDexterity.
The process is intended to run in an item context (implicit 'this'); the check uses Item::getSurfaceWeight(this) as a single boolean-like gate.
No global flags, menus, or dialogue are touched; the script's effect is a single conditional stat award.
notable_control_flow: Single conditional branch: if Item::getSurfaceWeight(this) == 0 then call AccumulateDexterity(0x0F).
No loops, no menu branches, and no reads/writes to global flags.
open_questions: Which in-game actor receives the dexterity increase when AccumulateDexterity is called (the script does not explicitly pass an actor handle) — likely the avatar/owner but not explicit (confidence: medium).
What exact semantics does surface weight == 0 represent here (not on any surface vs. weightless) — inferred as 'not on a surface / in inventory' but not certain (confidence: medium).
Under what concrete player action or engine event is processType 0x020D invoked for this item (inferred to be an item U8P_FROCK::release/drop event but not guaranteed) — confidence: medium.

main_function.name: U8P_FROCK::release
main_function.purpose: When the item is processed for U8P_FROCK::release, check whether its surface weight is zero and, if so, grant a dexterity bonus of 0x0F (15) via AccumulateDexterity.
entry_conditions: Process type is 0x020D (this script is a 'U8P_FROCK::release' process tied to the item instance).
Runtime condition: Item::getSurfaceWeight(this) == 0 (only then AccumulateDexterity is invoked).

function_map.name: U8P_FROCK::release
function_map.role: Utility process that conditionally awards dexterity when the item has zero surface weight.

function_map.name: Item::getSurfaceWeight
function_map.role: Query used as the conditional gate to determine whether to award dexterity.

function_map.name: AccumulateDexterity
function_map.role: Engine call used to increase dexterity by a fixed amount (called with 0x0F).

external_calls.purpose: Check the item's surface weight (used as the condition to decide whether to award dexterity).
Award dexterity by the constant 0x0F (decimal 15); the exact recipient is not explicit in-script and is inferred by context (likely the player/owner).

quick_facts.behavior_summary_one_liner: U8P_FROCK::release is a small utility process that checks the item's surface weight and, if that weight is zero, awards 0x0F (15) dexterity via AccumulateDexterity.
